description: Your fiendish legacy connects you to the Abyss, granting poison resistance and toxic spellcasting.

trait.Darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

trait.Abyssal Resistance.description: You have resistance to Poison damage.

trait.Languages.description: You can speak, read, and write Common and Abyssal.
